text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Racing—an intense clash of speed versus speed, where every
millisecond counts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, I come upon a student who's silently dashing accross
the turf, totally lost in a world all her own.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Blissful." No other word can better describe the expression gracing
Silence Suzuka's visage as I observe her for the first time.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not often you see someone on the track this late on a day off. She
continues to run at a truly staggering speed.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Phew! A quiet course all to myself... Running at night is the best.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And maybe it's just my imagination, but the stars seem a little brighter
than usual tonight.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I've got this scenery all to myself.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Is there something I can do for you?
choice_data_list: No. I just noticed how happy you looked.
No. I just noticed how happy you looked.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: O-oh? Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Sorry, if you'll excuse me now... I want to run a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And after just a brief exchange of words, Silence Suzuka takes off
running once more. It seems she is not yet content with her extra
training this night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't recall ever seeing a runner happier to be out on the track past
dusk. The sight of her cutting through the evening breeze is truly one
to behold.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's only a few days until we're able to meet again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's at today's academy tryouts. All the race-ready students are
there to demonstrate their skill in hopes of being scouted.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's fast—really fast. There goes Silence Suzuka, leading by five
lengths. Six lengths. She leads by seven lengths!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
H-how does she maintain such speed? Does she really intend to keep
it up till the very end?!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
You'd expect her to be thoroughly tired out by now, but she refuses
to let go of that immense lead!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The runners have entered the final leg. The distance from the lead is
slowly closing—but Silence Suzuka remains solidly ahead! Can she
keep this up?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I won't give up the lead... to anyone!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka crosses the finish! She wins with ease, leaving
everyone else in the dust!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Neither the plight of her rivals nor the shouts from the crowd matter
to the runner. She needs only to fix her gaze ever forward to win with
such a vast lead.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Of course, I am not the only one to have such a thought.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka! That was truly a marvelous display! I would like to talk to you
about a training contract.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Eh? Oh, um... Okay.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
You've a fine pair of legs to be sure, but I just know that you are
capable of so much more!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: More than that? Do you mean it?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Yes. You performed wonderfully, but I can tell that you would be
nearly invincible with a bit more practical knowledge.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
If you'd like, I would be happy to teach you a better way of running. I
dare say that it would give you the lead in any race you desire to run
in.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The lead... in any race?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All right. I accept your scouting offer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unsurprisingly, she is snatched up before I am able to utter even a
single word.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Some time later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I enter the library one day to find Silence Suzuka and Air Groove
engaged in a rather technical-sounding conversation.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You'll be needing anaerobic energy for that instantaneous burst of
speed. And in order to maintain that speed, you need aerobic energy.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
There's a limit to how much anaerobic energy the body can afford to
expend, so it's of the utmost importance to decide how to conserve
and use it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Then that means, in order to speed up later on, I should focus on
conserving energy at the start of a race by suppressing my speed...
Do I have it right?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Right. This is one of the basic foundations of modern racing theory.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Theory is not something I've ever given much thought to before... I
suppose it's time I learned a bit more about it...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Air Groove. I'm glad you could break it down for me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It's my pleasure.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But I am a little surprised. You're known for exploding into the lead
right from the outset of a race and staying there. This would be quite
a change of pace.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, just a little.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'd better start today's runs and practice what you've told me. I'll see
you again later.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Theory... That must mean that it's the proper way of doing things.
Okay, if i run the way she taught me...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'll be fine. And surely the scenery will become even more beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's an air of doubt in her quiet murmurings. And having heard
them, I cannot help but become a bit concerned for the renowned
front runner.
